## What changed

Describe the problem and the smallest coherent solution.

## Truth state

- [ ] Current public canon
- [ ] Working extension
- [ ] Proposed experiment
- [ ] Long-range concept
- [ ] Interface or engineering change only

## Evidence and validation

- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] Equations, units, assumptions, and limits are explicit
- [ ] Interface claims are labeled as synthetic, observed, or verified
- [ ] Documentation changed with behavior

## Risk

List security, privacy, accessibility, causal-identification, or compatibility risks. Write “none known” only after checking.
